title: JV-19 - Release CI smoke for offline local default and artifact validation

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

body:
## Summary

Add CI smoke gates proving release artifacts run with local MT defaults and no outbound network.

## Why is this needed?

Release artifacts can build while missing runtime DLLs, model files, or default config behavior. CI must catch that before users do.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Release packaging from JV-18.
- Default config from JV-13.
- Provider/runtime from JV-11.
- Existing release workflow and CI workflow.

## Outputs

- release-smoke workflow or release job step.
- Offline/no-network smoke evidence.
- Artifact validator output attached to release or CI logs.

## Implementation approach

- Run packaged exe with controlled config and file audio/session fixture where feasible.
- Block outbound network for local default smoke.
- Assert mt_provider=local path produces or can produce a subtitle pair with installed model.
- Validate SHA256SUMS, licenses, docs, and runtime DLL presence.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] CI fails if local default tries Google without fallback consent.
- [ ] CI fails if runtime DLL/model/manifest is missing from artifact.
- [ ] CI emits non-secret evidence for config, model version, and smoke result.
- [ ] Release job cannot publish stable artifact if smoke fails.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Network-blocked smoke command.
- [ ] Artifact file inventory test.
- [ ] Config default assertion.
- [ ] Secret scan on CI logs/artifacts.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-13 and JV-18.
- Blocks stable release in JV-21.

## Agent routing

CI/release specialist plus nfr-verification-gate.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-19
- Wave: RP2 release CI
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: ci, type: testing, area: verification, area: packaging, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New release gate; existing release.yml only builds/packages.
